conflict_description: User can create a vendor and approve payments to that vendor
control_objective: Prevent one user from initiating and approving vendor payment activity
recommended_mitigation: Separate vendor maintenance from payment approval or require documented compensating control

conflict_description: User can create and approve invoices
control_objective: Prevent one user from creating and approving financial obligations
recommended_mitigation: Remove one permission or require secondary approval workflow

conflict_description: User can reconcile and approve payments
control_objective: Maintain independent review between reconciliation and approval

conflict_description: User can administer accounts and approve role assignments
control_objective: Prevent self-service or unauthorized privilege elevation
recommended_mitigation: Restrict role approval to IAM management or independent approver

conflict_description: User can update and approve payroll changes
control_objective: Prevent unauthorized payroll changes from being approved by the same user
recommended_mitigation: Separate payroll update and approval permissions

conflict_description: User can mark users as offboarded and control system access
control_objective: Ensure HR offboarding and IAM access removal remain independently validated
recommended_mitigation: Require IAM review and access deprovisioning audit evidence

conflict_description: User can upload and approve audit evidence
User can export reports and approve final financial statements
control_objective: Reduce risk of reporting manipulation without review
recommended_mitigation: Require manager review and approval documentation

conflict_description: User can perform access review and approve their own exceptions
control_objective: Prevent access reviewers from approving unresolved exceptions without oversight
recommended_mitigation: Route exception approval to independent control owner

conflict_description: User can configure systems and delete logs
control_objective: Preserve audit trail integrity and prevent concealment of unauthorized activity
recommended_mitigation: Remove log deletion access or require restricted break-glass approval
